Jobs, jobs, jobs

September 1994
Journalism & Newsroom

NICAR is receiving increased requests from news organizations seeking Computer-Assisted Reporting (CAR) professionals, and interested candidates can contact Brant Houston to be considered for positions.

Jobs, jobs, jobs

Speaking of job switches, NICAR is getting more and more requests from news organizations looking for CAR reporters and editors.

If you want your name quietly suggested as a possibility, give Brant Houston a call at (314) 882-1984. We hope to put together a job bank later this year.
